name: borrower_name_present
expression: borrower_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(borrower_name)) > 0
description: Loan agreement must identify the borrower.

name: commitment_amount_positive
description: Commitment amount must be positive when present.

name: maturity_after_agreement_date
expression: maturity_date IS NULL OR agreement_date IS NULL OR maturity_date > agreement_date
description: Maturity should be after agreement date.

name: financial_covenants_array_valid
description: Financial covenants should be represented as an array.

name: governing_law_present
expression: governing_law IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(governing_law)) > 0
description: Governing law is important for legal ops and enforceability review.
